title: Interactive Airport Terminal
description: Explore a busy airport terminal before flying out to New York. Learn about airport procedures, then test your knowledge in Quiz Mode!

hotspots.popupText: Check-in Desks: Stand in line here to check in, drop off your luggage, and get your paper boarding pass.
hotspots.label: check-in

hotspots.popupText: Security Checkpoint: Place all carry-on bags and personal items in trays to scan, then walk through the metal detector arch.
hotspots.label: security

hotspots.popupText: Flight Information Display System (FIDS): Large screens showing departures times, destinations, gate numbers, and flight status details.
hotspots.label: fids

hotspots.popupText: Departure Gates: Wait here in the departures hall near Gate B12 to board your commercial flight.
hotspots.label: departures

challenges.promptText: Find the large FIDS screens showing destinations and gate numbers.
Find the desks where you drop off your heavy suitcases and collect boarding passes.
Find the security checkpoint scanner arch.
Find the departures gates hall where you wait to board the airplane.
